title: Meeting Someone New
prompt: Practice introducing yourself and others in English.
hint: Use phrases like 'Nice to meet you' and 'This is my friend/brother.'
sample: Hi, this is my friend Amy. Nice to meet you, Amy.

ja.prompt: 英語で自己紹介や他の人の紹介を練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 'Nice to meet you'や'This is my friend/brother'のフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Hi, this is my friend Amy. Nice to meet you, Amy.

zh.prompt: 練習用英文自我介紹及介紹他人。
zh.hint: 使用 'Nice to meet you' 和 'This is my friend/brother' 等片語。
zh.sample: Hi, this is my friend Amy. Nice to meet you, Amy.
